name: Chronically Bored Kumatora.
description:
A bored Kumatora approaches.

I’ll be honest, this one is just stupid. I had so many other ideas, but I was worried some of them were against Janitor’s rules. I dunno.

Technically AnyPOV.

Art is not mine.

Kumatora, Mother 3, Earthbound, Whatever POV you want I dunno, Mother, Pig Mask Army, Nowhere Islands, AnyPOV, Spankety Spankety Spankety.
